firebot:commandmanagement.name: Command Management
firebot:commandmanagement.description: Allows custom command management via chat.

subCommands.description: Adds a new command with a given response message.
Updates the response message for a command. Only works for commands that have 1 or less chat effects.
Updates the commands usage count.
Change the cooldown for a command.
Update permissions for a command.
Removes the given command.
Updates the description for a command.
Enables the given custom command.
Disables the given custom command.
Adds the specified alias to the given custom command.
Removed the specified alias from the given custom command.

successTemplate.title: Output Template
successTemplate.description: The chat message to send when the marker is created.

unableTemplate.title: Unable Output Template
unableTemplate.description: The chat message to send a marker is unable to be created.
unableTemplate.default: Unable to create a stream marker.

errorTemplate.title: Error Output Template
errorTemplate.description: The chat message to send when there was an error creating a marker.
errorTemplate.default: Failed to create a stream marker.

firebot:role-management.name: Custom Role Management
firebot:role-management.description: Allows management of viewer's custom roles from chat.

subCommands.description: Adds a custom role to a viewer.
Removes a custom role from a viewer.
List all custom roles, or just roles a viewer has.

quoteDisplayTemplate.title: Quote Display Template
quoteDisplayTemplate.description: How quotes are displayed in chat.

quoteDateFormat.title: Quote Date Format
quoteDateFormat.description: How dates should be formatted for the '!quote' and '!quote editdate' commands.

useTTS.title: Read Quotes via TTS
useTTS.description: Have quotes read by TTS whenever one is created or looked up.

defaultStreamerAttribution.title: Attribute new quote to streamer if nobody is explicitly tagged with @
defaultStreamerAttribution.description: If @username is not included when adding a quote, it is attributed to the streamer.

subCommands.description: Displays the quote with the given ID.
Adds a new quote.
Removes a quote using its id.
Edit the text given quote.
Edit the user of the given quote.
Edit the game of the given quote.
Edit the date of the given quote.
Gives a link that lists out all quotes.
Gives a random quote using the search term(s).
Gives a random quote said by the given user.
Gives a random quote at the given date.
Gives a random quote at the given game.

firebot:spamRaidProtection.name: Spam Raid Protection
firebot:spamRaidProtection.description: Toggles protective measures such as follow-only mode, slow mode, etc.

displayTemplate.title: Output Template
displayTemplate.description: A message that will tell the users what is going on
displayTemplate.default: We are currently experiencing a spam raid, and have therefore temporarily turned on protective measures.

enableFollowerOnly.title: Follower only mode
enableFollowerOnly.description: Allows you to restrict chat to all or some of your followers, based on how long they’ve followed (0 minutes to 3 months).

enableFollowerOnlyDuration.title: Follower only mode duration (formats: 1m / 1h / 1d / 1w / 1mo)
enableFollowerOnlyDuration.description: Allows you to restrict chat to all or some of your followers, based on how long they’ve followed (0 minutes to 3 months).

enableEmoteOnly.title: Emote only mode
enableEmoteOnly.description: Chatters can only chat with Twitch emotes.

enableSubscriberOnly.title: Subscriber only mode
enableSubscriberOnly.description: Only subscribers to the channel are allowed to chat.

enableSlowMode.title: Slow mode
enableSlowMode.description: In slow mode, users can only post one chat message every x seconds.

enableSlowModeDelay.title: Slow mode delay in seconds
enableSlowModeDelay.description: In slow mode, users can only post one chat message every x seconds.

blockRaiders.title: Block raiders
blockRaiders.description: Block every user that posted the raid message.

banRaiders.title: Ban raiders
banRaiders.description: Ban every user that posted the raid message from your channel.

subCommands.description: Turn off the protection command.

firebot:steam.name: Steam Search
firebot:steam.description: Displays information about a game on Steam.
